spec: Issuer-binding is additive (ADR-053): legacy provenance Titles (title over a pre-existing κ) and issuer-bound asset Titles (a new asset whose κ commits to its creator's key) coexist; both re-derive and self-verify (Law L5); asset minting refuses originator impersonation at creation; the transfer path is unchanged. Exclusivity/scarcity (double-genesis fork, double-spend) remains a Layer-2 anchor concern, not closed here.
